calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar May-25-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: no appearances.

parties are deemed to have stipulated that the motion will be decided by the Pro Tem Judge with the same authority as a Superior Court Judge.

the court adopts its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'s motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions is granted. Moving party to prepare proposed order.

judge pro tem james watson, not reported.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Robert Cohn, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Creditor Trade Assoc, and with Witness: Gary Rooney, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendants Poleng Holdings; Kane Douglas aka and Defaulted Defendant Desi Dangann.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Principal $7,223.15
Interest $3,206.25
Costs $370.00
Attorney's Fee $1,050.00
Total $1,189.40
Counsel to prepare the judgment and submit to Dept. 514 for approval.
